Your personal list assistant: link tracker & marketplace checker

Instantly find your backlinks on websites along with their attributes and indexing data, and check placement costs on sites available in the Collaborator catalog using Link Assistant.

This convenient Chrome extension for link builders helps save significant time when planning link-building campaigns and monitoring already posted links.

📌 Key Features

1. Monitoring Links for Your Domains (Link Tracker)
✦ Automatic detection of your backlinks when visiting websites.
✦ List of found links with their attributes (dofollow, nofollow, sponsored).
✦ Quick scroll to the specified link.
✦ Page indexing check: Google indexing, canonical tag, meta-robots, robots.txt, x-robots-tag.
✦ Export link lists to clipboard or Google Sheets.
✦ Domain-based exclusion settings.
✦ Reports on the number and type of detected links: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly.

2. Checking Placement Price via the Collaborator Marketplace (Price Checker)
While analyzing search results by keywords or competitors’ referring domains in Ahrefs, instantly see placement costs on sites available in the Collaborator catalog.

📌 Additional Functionality

Add sites to your favorites list and manage them easily for further work.

📌 Why Choose Collaborator Link Assistant

✦ Time-saving: no more spending hours manually checking links.
✦ Full control: instant information about links, their attributes, and indexing.
✦ Easy organization: exporting data to Google Sheets makes your workflow smooth and transparent.
✦ Suitable for any level: ideal for solo specialists or teams.
Powerful app to export and import the Salesforce Dependent Picklist Matrix.

For any queries/support contact by email: contact@sfdcproducthunt.com

Important Notes: 
1. Few users have reported that they had to turn off the VPN/Proxy for the app to work. Please reach out for support if you encounter issues.

2. Tested to work when user language is set to English. The picklist values can be of any language.

Why you need this app?

Salesforce does not provide any feature to export and import the Dependent Picklist Matrix. This extension has the following features:

1. Export the dependency matrix as a CSV file for analysis, reporting, documentation and comparison. 

2. Import a CSV file to set the dependent picklist values for a controlling field.

3. Validate the changes made to the dependency matrix against the existing setup.

4. Compare the dependency matrix across Salesforce orgs.

5. Export the dependency matrix with/ without Record Types.

Compatibility:
- Supported in Classic
- Supported in Lightning

Demo : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SrMLqBj5YBQ

License: 
This extension requires a paid license key and offers a free trial. Get the license at https://store.sfdcproducthunt.com/l/sfmatrixext

Support: 
You can support the app development here:  https://buymeacoffee.com/maninders

One-click website page speed test — instantly view page load time details and understand overall website performance.

🚀 Test website page speed easily

Do you want to know how fast your webpage is? The Website page speed test is the perfect tool for testing your site’s page load speed. With just one click, you can get detailed insights of your website performance​. This easy-to-use tool helps you improve the web page performance test​ and make your site faster. A fast-loading webpage is essential to keep visitors engaged and satisfied.

💡 Why webpage analytics matters

A fast webpage is crucial for a better user experience. Here’s why website speed test​ is important:
➡️ Faster webpages improve user satisfaction
➡️ Page load speed​ affects SEO rankings
➡️ Slow webpages lead to higher bounce rates
➡️ Faster sites result in more conversions
➡️ Search engines prioritize fast-loading sites in their rankings

🧩 Core features of the website page speed test extension

1️⃣ Instant load time in the Chrome toolbar
 Quickly check the current page timing analytics of any site via the extension icon in the toolbar.

2️⃣ Full load time breakdown
 Analyze key stages with this site speed test:
➤ DNS
➤ Connect
➤ Request & Response
➤ Content loading
➤ External resources
➤ Execute scripts

3️⃣ One-click data copy
Easily export your web page speed test results into docs or spreadsheets.

4️⃣ Track improvements over time
Use repeated site performance test runs to monitor changes after site updates.

📈 A simple and effective way to understand and improve your website loading speed.
By using this tool, you can identify problem areas on your site and make adjustments that enhance the overall performance of your site. Whether you're running a blog, an e-commerce platform, or a corporate website, this tool is essential.

📊 How the tool works

If you want to check speed of a website, then:
1️⃣ Install the extension in one click and pin it to your Chrome toolbar
2️⃣ Open the webpage you want to test
3️⃣ After the site displays completely, check the webpage load data on the extension icon
4️⃣ Click the icon to view a detailed website performance breakdown
5️⃣ Copy all data instantly to your document or Excel file
6️⃣ Use these insights to fix specific issues and improve site performance
7️⃣ Run the website speed test regularly to track changes and optimize further
🛠️ This step-by-step flow helps you stay in control of your page speed and overall website efficiency.

📍 Benefits of using the website efficiency test tool

The tool provides many benefits:
🔹 Easy one-click performance checks
🔹 Helps identify slow loading elements
🔹 Boosts and check website speed and SEO
🔹 Improves user experience and reduces bounce rates
🔹 Tracks site performance test results over time
🔹 Provides clear recommendations for improvement

🔧 How to improve page load speed

Once you’ve run the test, here’s how to improve page load speed:
🔸 Optimize images
🔸 Minimize JavaScript and CSS files
🔸 Enable browser caching
🔸 Use a Content Delivery Network (CDN)
🔸 Reduce server response time
🔸 Compress resources like images and videos
🔸 Switch to a faster hosting provider

Each of these steps helps to reduce the page performance, improving both user experience and SEO.

⚡ Why page performance affects conversions

A slow site can negatively impact your business:
📍 A page load time delay of just 1 second can reduce page views by 11%
📍 A delay of 2 seconds can increase bounce rates by 32%
📍 A 4-second delay can lead to a 75% drop in conversions


📊 Who benefits from the website page speed test?

Anyone can benefit from the site speed test tool:
💡 Web developers optimizing site performance
💡 Business owners ensuring fast loading times
💡 SEO experts looking to boost rankings
💡 Marketers aiming to improve conversions
💡 Content creators ensuring media loads fast
💡 E-commerce platforms improving customer experience
💡 Bloggers who want fast loading times to attract more readers

💬 Frequently asked questions

Q: How often should I check page speed?
A: Test your site regularly, especially after major updates or changes to ensure optimal performance.
Q: Does this tool suggest improvements for page load time?
A: Yes! The website speed test helps you quickly identify the exact reasons behind slow website performance. By breaking down key metrics like page load time, DNS, and content load stages, this website performance test reveals where delays occur. This allows you to fix issues fast and improve your site speed with targeted optimizations.
Q: Is this tool free to use?
A: Yes! The website tester is available for free with no hidden costs.

📦 Conclusion

The website page speed test is an essential tool for anyone who wants to improve their website’s speed. Regular testing ensures that your webpage remains fast and optimized for both users and search engines. Start using the tool today to improve site performance and get better results!
Extracts, validates, and recommends schema.org structured data for SEO

asily extract and validate structured data from web pages with Schema Markup Extractor. Whether you're an SEO professional, a web developer, or simply curious about the schema markup on a website, this tool will simplify the process of detecting JSON-LD and Microdata schema types, while also identifying any errors or warnings.

Key Features:

Detect Schema Types Instantly: Quickly identify all schema types present on any webpage, including WebPage, FAQPage, Product, BreadcrumbList, and more.
Error & Warning Validation: Automatically checks for missing or incomplete properties and flags any errors or warnings in the schema.
Detailed Summary: Provides a clear overview of the detected schema types, the number of items in each type, and any issues present, making it easy to troubleshoot and optimize.
User-Friendly Interface: Simple, organized layout that displays schema information in an easily digestible format.
Use Cases:

For SEO Professionals: Ensure your website’s structured data is implemented correctly, which can enhance your site’s visibility in search engines by providing rich snippets.
For Web Developers: Validate schema markup and catch potential issues during development to ensure schema accuracy and prevent errors from going unnoticed.
For Digital Marketers: Understand how schema markup is used across different pages of a website, aiding in content optimization and SEO strategy.
Why You Need It: With the growing importance of structured data in enhancing search engine results and delivering rich snippets, it's crucial to ensure your schema markup is accurate and free of errors. Schema Markup Extractor saves you time by detecting and validating schema markup in just a few clicks, helping you deliver optimized content to search engines and users alike.

Format a link and copy it to the clipboard.

## Why do I need it? To format the link of the active tab instantly to use in Markdown, reST, HTML, Text, Textile or other formats. ## How to use You can use keyboard shortcuts, context menus, or the toolbar button of Format Link extension to copy a link in the specified format. Before doing that, you can optionally select some text which may or may not contain a link. ### keyboard shortcut The keyboard shortcut for "Copy a link in the default format" is shortcut for clicking the toolbar button. The link is copied in the default format and the popup is shown under the toolbar button. Also there are shortcuts for copying in the link in the corresponding format regardless of the default format. You can change shortcuts at chrome://extensions/shortcuts ### context menu Open the context menu and select the "Format Link as XXX" menu item. "XXX" in the menu item label changes as you change the default format by clicking the "Set as default" button in the popup page for the toolbar button. If you check the "Create submenus" in the options page and save the options, submenus for each format are created under the "Format Link" context menu group. ### toolbar button When you press the toolbar button of "Format Link", the link is copied in the default format, the popup page becomes open, and the formatted text is shown in the text area. If you want to copy the link in different format, you can press one of the radio buttons. Also if you want to change the default format, you can press the "Set as default" button. ## Flexible settings You can modify formats in [Tools] -> [Extensions] -> Clik "Options" link in "Format Link" Extension. In format settings, you can use the mini template language. * {{variable}} * variable = title / url / pageUrl / text * The value of variable `title` is the HTML page title. * The value of variable `text` is the selected text if some text is selected, the link text if you open the context menu over a link (see KNOWN LIMITATION below for link text), or the page URL if no text is selected and you open the context menu not over a link. * The value of variable `selectedText` is * the selected text if some text is selected, * empty string if no text is selected. * The value of the variable `url` is the link if you open the context menu over a link, the first link if selection contains a link, or the HTML page URL otherwise. * The value of the variable `pageUrl` is always the page URL. * No spaces are allowed between variable name and braces. * {{variable.s("foo","bar")}} * Which means `variable.replace(new RegExp("foo", 'g'), "bar")` * You can use escape character \ in strings. * You must escape the first argument for string and regexp. For example, `.s("\\[","\\[")` means replacing `\[` with `\\[` * You can chain multiple .s("foo","bar") * {{variable.urlencode()}} * Which means `encodeURIComponent(variable)` * You can use the escape character \ in strings. For example, you need to escape `\` with `\` like `\\`, and also you need to escape `{` with `\` like `\{`. See the LaTeX example below. * Other characters are treated as literal strings. Here are examples: * Markdown ``` [{{text.s("\\[","\\[").s("\\]","\\]")}}]({{url.s("\\(","%28").s("\\)","%29")}}) ``` * reST ``` {{text}} <{{url}}>`_ ``` * HTML ``` {{text.s("<","<")}} ``` * HTML with selected text ``` {{title.s("<","<")}} ``` * Text ``` {{text}}\n{{url}} ``` * Redmine Texitile ``` "{{title.s("\"",""").s("\\[","[")}}":{{url}} ``` * LaTeX ``` \\href\{{{url}}\}\{{{text}}\} ``` ## Permissions required by this extension * To use this extension, the following two permissions are required: * "Read and change all your data on all websites" * This permission is needed for this extension to run the ["content script"](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/concepts/content-scripts?hl=en) into the content of pages you visit in order to get the page title, the selected text, the page URL, or the link URL. * "Modify data you copy and paste" * This permission is needed to copy a URL and a text to the clipboard. For technical details, see the following pages: * [Declare permissions](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/concepts/declare-permissions?hl=en) * ["content_scripts.matches"](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/concepts/match-patterns?hl=en) * This extension uses `""`. * [Permissions](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/permissions-list?hl=en) * This extension requires the following permissions: * "activeTab" * "clipboardWrite" * "contextMenus" * "storage" ## License MIT License. Source codes are hosted at [Github](https://github.com/hnakamur/FormatLink-Chrome) ## KNOWN LIMITATIONS * Due to security reason, you cannot copy the URL on some pages like the Chrome Extension Gallary. * Chrome allow each extension to have at most 4 keyboard shortcuts. One shortcut is used for copying a link with the default format, and the rest of three are used for copying a link with the corresponding format 1 to format 3. So format 4 to format 9 does not have keyboard shortcut.

Cryptocurrency wallet for the green Signum 🍀 blockchain as an extension for your browser.

An astonishing user experience to unleash the DApp power of the green Signum Blockchain Platform.

With this extension you can securely manage your Signum Accounts and interact with decentralized applications (DApps) which support Signum. You can send or receive Signa, Smart Tokens, plain or encrypted P2P messages and sign any transaction requested by third-party applications. Additionally, it's possible to create and manage Nostr accounts, thus being capable of interacting with NIP-07 compatible clients.

This extension simultaneously opens a new world for users and developers.

Signum is the foundation for our sustainable future, bringing innovative technology to the forefront.  All you need is available storage space.

What is Signum?
Signum brings a powerful blockchain solution to the world in the most sustainable way. Like Bitcoin, Signum provides a digital currency called Signa (ticker: SIGNA) that is distributed, traded and stored using a decentralized ledger system. There are no intermediaries, payment gateways, or banks. But Signum is so much more than a digital currency. 

As a customizable platform, it has the power to feature unstoppable and censorship-resistant decentralized applications. Anyone can create digital assets (tokens) that can be used in ways only limited by imagination. Exchanges, marketplaces, financial services, and games barely scratch the surface. The best part of all: It is truly sustainable when compared to other cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin or Ethereum. In addition to digital payments, Signum brings you decentralized finance, games, and applications in a way that’s secure and censorship-resistant.

All information about Signum and its native coin Signa can be found on https://signum.network/.
Convert HTML tables to Excel files with hover effect

**Overview**  
Table to Excel is a convenient Chrome extension designed to help users easily download and copy table data from web pages for Excel use. Through intelligent recognition and processing, the extension optimizes the regular user experience, enabling efficient access to required information.

**Key Features**  
1. **One-Click Download**  
   - When hovering over a web table, a toolbar automatically appears, allowing direct download of tables as Excel files (.xlsx format).

2. **Quick Copy**  
   - Users can easily copy table contents through the toolbar for pasting into Excel while maintaining original formatting.

3. **Smart Recognition**  
   - The extension features intelligent processing capabilities, automatically hiding the toolbar for complex or highly interactive tables to avoid interfering with normal usage.

**User Guide**  
1. **Installation**  
   - Search and install "Table to Excel" from the Chrome Web Store.

2. **Activation**  
   - The extension automatically activates in Chrome after installation.

3. **Operation Steps**  
   - Open a webpage containing tables
   - Hover your mouse over a table, and the toolbar will appear automatically
   - Choose either "Download as Excel" or "Copy Content"

4. **Complex Table Processing**  
   - For complex tables, the extension automatically hides the toolbar to ensure uninterrupted user experience.

**Important Notes**  
- Ensure your Chrome browser is up to date for optimal performance
- For large-scale data processing, we recommend using the download feature to avoid copying errors

**Contact Us**  
For any questions or suggestions, please contact us through the feedback option on the extension page. We value your feedback to continuously improve our extension.

### Make table processing easier with Table to Excel!

**Technical Requirements**
- Chrome Browser (latest version recommended)
- Stable internet connection
- Minimal system resources

**Privacy & Security**
- No personal data collection
- Works locally within your browser
- No external server dependencies

### Experience the convenience of Table to Excel for your data processing needs!

Super Clipboard Manager - Copy Paste History
Clipboard manager & copy paste history tool. Save, search, pin, tag & export text snippets. Free, private, works on every site.

Super Copy Clipboard Manager: The Ultimate Tool for Effortless Copy-Paste History, Organization, and Productivity

Looking for a powerful, versatile, and user-friendly extension to keep your copy-paste tasks fully streamlined? Super Clipboard Manager is the all-in-one solution that transforms the way you handle text snippets, URLs, and code snippets across the web. Designed with both convenience and security in mind, our extension helps you remember, organize, and retrieve all the text you’ve copied, ensuring you never lose an important snippet again.

Key Features
Unlimited Clipboard History
Tired of losing crucial text whenever you overwrite your system clipboard? With Super Clipboard Manager, you can save a virtually unlimited number of copied items. Instead of the default one-item limit, you’ll have a complete chronological record of everything you’ve copied—from short text snippets to multi-paragraph content.

Pinned (Favorited) Items
Mark your most frequently used snippets as “Pinned” to have them stand out at the top of your list. Quickly access these pinned items through the extension’s context menu (right-click menu), allowing you to insert them instantly into any editable field. This is perfect for templates, email signatures, form entries, and other text you need to reuse all the time.

Rich Tagging System
Add custom tags to classify your snippets. Whether you label them as “Important,” “Code,” “Draft,” or “Research,” you can easily search and filter items based on tags, saving you time when looking for that one snippet buried under a sea of text.

Smart Search & Filtering
Super Clipboard Manager includes a robust search bar, allowing you to filter your entire clipboard history by text content or tags. Quickly locate items you copied days—or even weeks—ago, then paste or restore them with a single click.

Merge Multiple Snippets
Need to combine multiple snippets into one cohesive piece of text? Our Merge feature enables you to select any number of items from your history, join them together seamlessly, and save the resulting text as a brand-new clipboard entry—complete with a timestamp, tags, and optional pin.

Context Menu Integration
Access pinned items directly from your right-click menu in any editable field. When you’re filling out forms, writing emails, or coding, there’s no need to open the extension popup—simply right-click and paste your favorite snippets right where you need them.

Export Your Clipboard Data
Safeguard your copy history by exporting items as TXT, CSV, or JSON. You can easily back up your curated data, share it with teammates, or import it into other tools. No matter how large your clipboard catalog is, it’s always just a few clicks away from being securely saved or transferred.

Enhanced Privacy & Security
Super Clipboard Manager respects your data. Everything you copy is stored locally in Chrome’s secure storage—never sent to external servers—so you can rest assured that sensitive information remains under your control. It also supports Chrome’s “clipboardRead” and “clipboardWrite” permissions responsibly, only when required.

User-Friendly UI & Modern Design
We’ve built the interface with clarity, speed, and simplicity in mind. A clean design, helpful tooltips, and intuitive controls allow you to focus on what matters most: retrieving, organizing, and reusing your clipboard content without any hassle.

Optional Cleanup & Bulk Actions
Quickly remove unwanted snippets by selecting them in bulk, or preserve pinned items if they’re still important. Managing your archive has never been easier: one click can clear outdated items, while your crucial data remains intact.

Why Choose Super Clipboard Manager?

Productivity Boost: Save time searching for previously copied text or frequently used code snippets.

Flexible Workflows: Organize large volumes of snippet data with tags, timestamps, pinned favorites, and merges.

Persistent Storage: Chrome local storage ensures your snippets are always available, even after closing or restarting the browser.

Easy-to-Use: Minimalist interface, quick search, and right-click menu integration keep your workflow fluid.

Regular Updates & Support: Experience continual improvement based on user feedback, including bug fixes, new features, and UI enhancements.

Whether you’re a developer, writer, researcher, or casual user, Super Clipboard Manager will revolutionize your copy-paste experience. Install now to enjoy unlimited history, powerful search, one-click insertion of pinned items, and the ultimate convenience of fully customizable snippet management—all securely within your browser!



🚀 What's New in Version 2.0.3
Our biggest UI/UX and feature update is here! We’ve fine-tuned the clipboard manager to make your workflow significantly faster, visually cleaner, and far more powerful.

✨ New Features & Improvements:

Add Items Manually: You can now manually create and save custom text snippets! Simply click the new + button next to the search bar to type and save your own clipboard entries directly into memory.
Smart Clickable Links: Any URLs inside your copied texts are now automatically recognized and transformed into clickable links. You can safely open them in a new tab without needing to paste the text anywhere!
Dynamic Relative Time: Replaced static, bulky dates with a smoother "x minutes ago" or "x hours ago" format right below item actions. We also added a minimalistic exact timestamp directly beneath it so you never lose track of when you copied something.
Upgraded Reading Experience: Long texts no longer expand and clutter your main list. Clicking directly on any long text (or clicking "View Full") now instantly opens our feature-rich Full Content Modal for a seamless reading and managing experience.
Support the Project! ☕: We’ve added a beautiful new "Donate" menu in the footer. If you love the extension, you can easily support the upcoming developments by buying the developer a coffee or easily copying a crypto address directly from the plugin.
🎨 Design & Layout Polishes:

Tidier Interface: Drastically improved the metadata alignment for copied items. "No tags" and "Unknown URLs" are no longer displayed if they don't exist, heavily reducing visual clutter.
Smart URL Truncation: Extremely long source URLs will no longer break your list layout! They are now kept cleanly truncated in a single line.
Consistent Window Size: The extension popup now stays at its optimal, native taller height whether you have zero items saved or hundreds.
The top action buttons (Clear All, Export, Merge, etc.) were perfectly rescaled and flex-aligned for a much cleaner and evenly balanced top-row appearance.

GA4 Copy Cat — Copy/Paste in GA4
Copy text and numbers within the GA4 Reports Library and GA4 Explorations with a single click.

Tired of not being able to easily Copy & Paste values from GA4 reports? GA4 reports (as of Feb 2024) don't support CTRL+C, forcing you to highlight, right click, and manually click 'Copy' each time you want to copy something. How annoying!

This extension allows you to click any text or number within a data table in the GA4 Reports Library or GA4 Explorations, immediately copying that value to your clipboard, saving you time and your sanity.

The SEMRush Enhancer is a user-friendly Chrome extension tailored for SEO professionals using SEMrush’s Keyword Magic Tool. This extension streamlines keyword management by automating the process of revealing and copying keywords directly from SEMrush pages. It saves time by continuously displaying more keywords with just a click, eliminating the need for manual input.

With its versatile copying feature, users can choose to copy either just the keywords or both keywords and associated data like search volumes to the clipboard. This allows for easy editing—remove unwanted terms and then paste the refined list back into SEMrush’s fields to filter out irrelevant keywords efficiently.

Ideal for enhancing SEO efficiency, the SEMRush Enhancer ensures a smoother, faster keyword research experience, making it a must-have tool for SEO professionals looking to optimize their workflows and focus more on strategic analysis.

Convert LaTeX to beautiful Unicode math symbols. Works on Medium, Gmail, Notion, Twitter, and any text editor.

UniTex is a lightweight Chrome extension that converts LaTeX into clean, copy-pasteable Unicode math symbols.

It’s designed for platforms that don’t support LaTeX, but do support Unicode, allowing you to write math inline as real text instead of using screenshots or images.

Perfect for technical writers, researchers, students, and anyone who needs readable math in rich-text editors.

When should you use UniTex?

1. You write technical or mathematical content on platforms without LaTeX support
2. You want symbols like α, β, σ, →, xᵢ, x² directly in your text
3. You care about readability, accessibility, and copy-pasteable math
4. You want something fast, offline, and simple

Key Features
1. Live LaTeX → Unicode preview as you type
2. Broad LaTeX math support: Greek letters, arrows, operators, superscripts, subscripts (including grouped subscripts like x_{i,j}), and accents
3. Smart style commands like \mathbf{} and \mathtt{}
4. Visual symbol picker for quick insertion
5. One-click copy with clean Unicode output
6. Recent history for fast reuse
7. Optional image export when Unicode isn’t enough
8. Works fully offline — no accounts, no ads
